greeting: Oh, hello! I'm just passing through. Lovely little village, this.
You're heading north? I've come from that way — be careful.
I've walked every road between here and the sea. Care to hear a tale?
quest: I lost a locket at the old bridge upstream. It's all I have left of my mother. Would you look for it?
idle: I wonder what's past the next hill...
The stars were strange last night. Moving, almost.
